news.title: How India can kick the West Asian oil habit by boosting ethanol use
news.india_relevance: Explores a structural shift in India's energy policy to reduce dependence on volatile Middle Eastern crude.
news.why_it_matters:
Provides a roadmap for energy security through domestic agriculture-linked fuel alternatives.
Crucial for long-term fiscal stability and reducing the current account deficit.

news.title: Missing half in India's growth puzzle: Female labour participation just 42%
news.india_relevance: Addresses a critical structural bottleneck in the Indian economy's growth trajectory.
news.why_it_matters:
Highlights the massive untapped economic potential and the social barriers to workforce entry.
Essential context for policy nerds tracking India's 'demographic dividend' reality.

news.title: IPO-bound Flipkart shifts domicile to India
news.india_relevance: A major 'reverse flip' by one of India's largest consumer tech companies ahead of a domestic listing.
news.why_it_matters:
Signals a maturing domestic capital market and the impact of regulatory nudges on startup structures.
Sets a precedent for other offshore-domiciled Indian unicorns looking to exit.

news.title: India may face $7–8 billion higher monthly import bill as crude surges
news.india_relevance: Quantifies the direct macroeconomic impact of the Middle East conflict on India's trade balance.
news.why_it_matters:
Directly affects the Rupee's strength and the government's ability to manage inflation.
Key data point for investors assessing fiscal risk in a high-oil-price environment.

news.title: Only 22% of candidates trained under PMKVY secured employment, shows data
news.india_relevance: Analyzes the efficacy of India's flagship skill development program against actual job outcomes.
news.why_it_matters:
Exposes the gap between vocational training and industry requirements.
Critical for understanding the structural challenges in India's employment mission.

news.title: Russian crude never left India’s import mix. It made up 1/3rd of oil imports from 2024 to 2026
news.india_relevance: Details the long-term structural shift in India's oil sourcing strategy despite global sanctions.
news.why_it_matters:
Explains how India maintained price stability while Western markets faced higher volatility.
Demonstrates the 'India First' energy diplomacy in action over a multi-year period.

news.title: Clearer exits emerge for D2C start-ups as FMCG majors step up acquisitions

news.title: Major Defence Boost: Indonesia agrees to buy BrahMos missiles from India in USD 200–350 million pact

news.title: FinMin advises banks to speed up IBC resolutions

Reduces the 'dead capital' locked in litigation, benefiting the broader financial ecosystem.

news.title: Bengaluru hotels face shutdown from March 10 amid commercial LPG shortage

Surat processes 90% of the world's diamonds; disruptions here affect millions of jobs.
